name: 16.8 fl oz Stoneware Latte Mug Blue Floral - Threshold™
description:
Bring an artistic update to your mug collection with the Stoneware Latte Mug from Threshold™. This latte mug in a cream color features a blue floral pattern along the rim for eye-catching contrast. Suitable for serving hot beverages, the stoneware mug is both dishwasher and microwave safe for quick cleaning and easy reheating.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
